title: Dashboard Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger dashboard design foundations judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Dashboard Design Foundations is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Dashboard Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good dashboard design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Dashboard Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
